---
name: Bug report
about: Something is wrong with a per-app .app, the standard, or the build pipeline
title: "[bug] <short description>"
labels: bug
---

## What's wrong

A short description of the bug.

## Which per-app (or shared infra)?

- [ ] A specific per-app (which one?)
- [ ] The shared wrapper
- [ ] The CI / build pipeline
- [ ] The standard (STANDARD.md)
- [ ] The agent (agent-prompt.md)

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected

What should happen.

## Actual

What actually happens. Include logs, screenshots, etc.

## Environment

- macOS version: (e.g. 26.5)
- App version: (e.g. 0.1.0)
- Bundle ID: (e.g. com.pewdiepie-archdaemon.odysseus)
